title: Unified Financial and Sales Dashboards for Multi-Entity Reporting
excerpt: Finance and sales teams operated from siloed systems with limited ability to analyze performance across business units, timeframes, or metrics.

seo.title: Unified Financial and Sales Dashboards for Multi-Entity Reporting
seo.description: Finance and sales teams operated from siloed systems with limited ability to analyze performance across business units, timeframes, or metrics.

challenge: Finance and sales teams operated from siloed systems with limited ability to analyze performance across business units, timeframes, or metrics.
whatWeDid: Integrated multiple ERP and operational systems, built analytics-ready data models, and delivered real-time dashboards tailored separately for finance and sales teams.
outcome: Improved visibility across entities, reduced manual reporting, and faster decision-making through interactive, real-time dashboards.
